name: Alien Slayers
short_description: Alien Slayers is a roguelite time survival game where you hunt down hostile alien creatures on various planets. Grab your weapon and survive to the end to become the strongest alien.
detailed_description:
Space, the final frontier filled with hostile aliens. You've been hired to slay the aliens and complete the mission, but the native creatures won't take it easy. Grab your weapon and survive to the end to become the strongest alien.

Controls

  • [Arrow] / [WASD] / [Numpad] to move character
  • [Shift] + [Move] to change direction without moving
  • [Space bar] to use character skill
  • [Enter] to Select
  • [Esc] to Back

Features

  • Auto-firing weapons and reloading
  • Various character and mission
  • Over 40+ Equipments, Training, Drone, Skill, Perk, Mutant systems

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
